prompt: Please transform the person in the photo into a realistic vintage Monchhichi doll in the 1970-80s Sekiguchi style. Maintain the original's facial structure, hairstyle, hair color, expression, pose, composition, and camera angle accurately so the person remains identifiable even in doll form. Follow the classic Monchhichi design with a large head and a short, stout plush body (approx. 1:1 ratio) with simplified limbs. The face should be a matte vinyl material showing signs of age like fine scratches and discoloration, with small shiny dark eyes, a glossy nose, and a soft smile. The body is covered in dense, faded brown synthetic fur. Recreate the original outfit using faded simple sewn cotton. Set the scene under warm indoor lighting with a vintage film grain and yellowish tint, presented as a centered full-body collector's doll photo against a clean background. No text.
